title: Account settings
description: Manage your appearance, language and account security.

language.description: Choose the display language for the website interface.

password.changeDescription: Update your password to protect your account.
password.setupDescription: Set up a password for your social login account.
password.confirmMismatch: The confirmation password does not match.

validation.required: Please fill in all required information!
validation.confirmMismatch: The confirmation password does not match!
validation.weakPassword: The password does not meet the security requirements!
validation.error: Something went wrong, please try again!

security.title: Security notes
security.description: A few tips to help you create a stronger and safer password.
tips: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters.
Combine uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers and special characters.
Do not use personal information that is easy to guess.
Change your password regularly to keep your account secure.
